raw_consumer_statement:
I am filing a complaint regarding an unresolved dispute with Citibank involving an unauthorized charge. 

The charge in question was from XXXX XXXX on XX/XX/year>, in the amount of {$500.00}. I did not authorize this charge, as I had already canceled the service prior to that date and provided written confirmation of my cancellation to Citibank. Despite this, the merchant charged my card. While the merchant later issued a partial credit of {$68.00}, the remaining charge is still unauthorized.

I have been attempting to resolve this issue for over six months. During this time, I have provided documentation, including proof of cancellation, yet the dispute remains unresolved. I was also explicitly advised by a Citibank representative not to pay the disputed amount. As a result of following this guidance, I incurred {$160.00} and {$150.00} in interest charges.

Additionally, the handling of this matter has negatively impacted my account. Due to the disputed charge, my grace period was lost, and I am now being charged ongoing interest even though I have been paying my full balance each month.

Throughout this process, I have received inconsistent and conflicting information from different representatives. None of the guidance provided aligned from one interaction to the next. I escalated the matter to a manager, who disconnected the call before the issue was addressed. I am requesting that recordings of all calls related to this dispute be reviewed.

I have made payments in good faith to avoid further financial harm, but these payments should not be interpreted as acceptance of the charge.

I am requesting that the unauthorized charge be fully reversed, that all related interest charges be credited back to my account, and that the handling of this dispute be formally reviewed.
